etymology.description: semantic 欠(欠) (qiàn, "lack") + phonetic 手(手) (shǒu) -> disorderly or chaotic
etymology.interpretation: The character 𣬉 combines the semantic element 欠(欠) (qiàn, "lack"), suggesting a deficiency or disorder, with the phonetic element 手(手) (shǒu), which contributes the sound. The idea of 'lacking' or 'not having' something contributes to the sense of being disorderly or chaotic, as imbalance often signifies disturbance or irregularity.
